title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Addressed Claude review blockers for session inbox phase 1. Session batch succeeded now means all non-failed results (pending_provider_response + no_op) and adds no_ops for already-ingested files. Added mixed-outcome regression covering pending request, duplicate no-op/reconcile repair, unsupported source failure/quarantine, partial_success, and aggregate counts. Documented the ingest-inbox --provider session batch envelope and pending_provider_response contract in provider-handoff-contract.md, plus workflow rerun/side-effect notes. Verification: uv run pytest => 120 passed; py_compile passed; git diff --check passed.
next_actions: Next: rerun Claude review on the updated working tree. If clean, commit this session inbox phase-1 slice, including the iQ Context state updates if desired under the project source-control policy. After commit, move to active-agent wrapper automation that consumes batch pending_provider_response results and completes phase 2.
continuation_hint: Next: Next: rerun Claude review on the updated working tree. If clean, commit this session inbox phase-1 slice, including the iQ Context state updates if desired under the project source-control policy. After commit, move to active-agent wrapper automation that consumes batch pending_provider_response results and completes phase 2.
